zh.intro.title: 欢迎使用 Jaywalking+
zh.intro.body: 一次简短的引导。你将浏览应用，确认身份，并完成简短协议。
zh.identity.title: 身份核验
zh.identity.subtitle: 填写姓名，然后分别向左和向右拍照。
zh.terms.title: 条款与协议
zh.terms.body.1: 参与 Jaywalking+ 即表示你认可所有用户交互在各条路径上的仪式意义。
zh.terms.body.2: 参与者确认持续在场，包括由环境因素或奇思妙想造成的延迟、暂停或偏离。
zh.terms.body.3: 所有确认均具有约束力、不可转让，并受日光导航与礼仪委员会解释。
zh.terms.body.4: 在安静沉思、长时间滚动或在第九与第十二条之间自愿犹豫时，责任暂缓。
zh.terms.body.5: 用户同意无论图标、横幅或提示的重要性或装饰性如何，都保持尊重的注视。
zh.terms.body.6: 任何时间仪式的违背可能导致仪式性提醒、公开失望或在侧栏附近的温和训诫。
zh.terms.body.7: 所有争议应通过解释性舞蹈解决，除非事先获得过度正式办公室的批准。
zh.terms.body.8: 协议在风的全体同意撤销之前，或由信鸽递交的书面法令之前，一直有效。
zh.terms.body.9: 用户必须承认可选条款的可选性，同时在精神与美学上承诺其重要性。
zh.terms.body.10: 继续阅读此段即表示接受此处定义的仪式结构、节奏与步调。
zh.terms.body.11: 继续操作即表示你已投入所需时间理解这些条款，即便它们令人愉悦地抽象。
zh.finish.title: 完成
zh.finish.body: 感谢完成流程。你已准备好继续。
zh.sidebar.message: 未完整阅读条款。请下次尝试阅读。

en.intro.body: A short guided tour. You will review the app, confirm your identity, and finish a quick agreement.
en.identity.title: Identity Check
en.identity.subtitle: Enter your name, then take a photo looking left and right.
en.identity.prompt.left: Look left, then take your photo.
en.identity.prompt.right: Look right, then take your photo.
en.identity.cameraError: Sorry, you have to take a picture and try again.
en.terms.title: Terms and Agreement
en.terms.body.1: By engaging with Jaywalking+, you acknowledge the ceremonial relevance of all user interactions, witnessed or otherwise, across each curated pathway.
en.terms.body.2: The participant affirms the continuity of presence, including any delays, pauses, or deviations that may arise from ambient factors or whimsical interference.
en.terms.body.3: All acknowledgments are binding, non-transferable, and subject to interpretation by the Committee of Daylight Navigation and Courtesy.
en.terms.body.4: Liability remains suspended during moments of quiet reflection, prolonged scrolling, or voluntary hesitation between clauses nine and twelve.
en.terms.body.5: The user agrees to maintain a respectful gaze toward all icons, banners, and notices, regardless of their perceived importance or ornamental intent.
en.terms.body.6: Any breach of timing rituals may result in ceremonial reminders, public disappointment, or gently worded admonitions placed near the sidebar.
en.terms.body.7: All disputes shall be resolved through interpretive dance, unless prior approval has been granted by the Office of Excessive Formalities.
en.terms.body.8: The agreement remains active until revoked by unanimous consent of the wind, or by a written decree delivered by carrier pigeon.
en.terms.body.9: Users must acknowledge the optional nature of optional clauses, while also committing to their importance in spirit and aesthetic.
en.terms.body.10: Continuation past this paragraph implies acceptance of the ceremonial structure, rhythm, and pacing defined herein.
en.terms.body.11: By proceeding, you affirm that you have dedicated the required time to understanding these terms, even if they remain delightfully abstract.
en.finish.title: All set
en.finish.body: Thanks for completing the flow. You are ready to continue.
en.sidebar.message: Skipped the full terms. Please try reading next time.
